title: No Darkness
description: Removes the Darkness Effect from the Warden in Ancients Cities
body:
![No Darkness Title](https://i.postimg.cc/28XN0Fj0/title.png)

# Removes the Darkness Effect / Makes you see again



### Here are some examples:

![Example of Mod on / Mod off without Fullbright](https://i.postimg.cc/X7BBHXN0/difference1.png)

![Example of Mod on / Mod off with Fullbright](https://i.postimg.cc/PqyCpwy1/difference2.png)

This mod disables the darkness effect you get from a warden making you able to see in ancient cities
